steps.title: Use the missing vertical line
steps.content:
The graph does not intersect $x=5$, so the denominator must be $0$ when $x=5$:
$$2(5)+c=0$$
$$10+c=0$$
$$c=-10$$

steps.title: Use the two zeros
steps.content:
Since $f(6)=0$ and $f(7)=0$, the numerator has roots $6$ and $7$:
$$x^2+ax+b=(x-6)(x-7)$$
$$x^2+ax+b=x^2-13x+42$$
Thus $a=-13$ and $b=42$.

steps.title: Add the constants
steps.content: Now add the three constants: $$a+b+c=-13+42+(-10)=19$$ The answer is 19.
